# Pull Request

## Description

Brief description of what this PR changes and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] 📊 Data addition (new website / theme / palette / font-pair / animation entry)
- [ ] 📝 Guide improvement (new section, example, or fallback pattern)
- [ ] 🧩 New template (React + TS + Tailwind component)
- [ ] 🎨 CSS / style improvement
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] 🔧 Tooling / CI / repo config

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published in downstream modules

### Data additions only

- [ ] No duplicate entries (searched existing data file)
- [ ] All JSON validates (`python -m json.tool data/<file>.json`)
- [ ] No proprietary fonts / palettes / images
- [ ] If adding a website, the link is live and the design note is specific (3+ sentences)
- [ ] If adding a palette, contrast ratios are accurate (use WebAIM or Stark)
- [ ] If adding a font pair, fonts are freely loadable (Google Fonts / Fontsource / OFL)

## Related issue

Closes #(issue number)

## Screenshots / demos

If applicable, add screenshots or link to a live demo.
